title: absolove 12 Pcs Christmas Kraft Gift Bags,Xmas Paper Bags Multipack with 6 Large & 6 Medium Different Sizes, Xmas Gift Bags With Handles Bulk,Tissue Paper for Christmas Holiday Party Presents Wrapping
features: [ Perfect Xmas Paper Bag Set ]: 12 absolove christmas gift bags multipack, consisting of 6 large Christmas gift bags and 6 medium-sized paper bags, with 12 hanging cards with various Christmas patterns and 10 metres of string, perfect for filling with small treats and all kinds of gifts, such as chocolate, wine and toys.

[ Two Sizes ]: the large Christmas wrapping bag measures 27x21x11cm (10.62 x 8.26 x 4.33 inches) and the medium Christmas paper bag measures 23x17.5x9cm (9.05 x 6.88 x 3.54 inches), two sizes that offer flexible size options. The Christmas gift bags have a large storage space, so you no longer have to worry about wrapping gifts.

[ Natural kraft paper bags with handles ]: The christmas gift bags multipack are made of high-quality kraft paper, which is a better quality material that is more wear-resistant, flexible, tear-resistant and stretchy. The handles are made of natural jute rope, which is comfortable to hold and not easy to break. They can be used safely to hold fragile items such as glasses and cups.

[ Personalised gift bags ]: 6 design patterns, vintage brown and bright green and red, with Christmas trees, Santa Claus, reindeer, snowmen, bells, Christmas stockings, ‘Merry Christmas’ and other classic Christmas motifs, make the gift bag full of festive atmosphere! The bold colour scheme ensures that your gift will stand out anywhere. Beautiful design, perfect for Christmas markets, boutiques, stalls, exhibitions, shops and food trucks.

[ Suitable for various occasions ]: Our xmas kraft paper bags are suitable for toys, biscuits, sweets, books, clothing and other small Christmas gifts for family, neighbours, employees or customers at family celebrations, Christmas parties, New Year's celebrations and other gift-giving occasions. Absolove gift bags are ideal for sending Christmas wishes to loved ones and friends!
